title: Quirks Unchained (My Hero Academia)
body:
# Quirks Unchained

Quirks Unchained is a My Hero Academia mod for 1.20.1, with 27 current quirks and 5 fighting styles

Within this mod you are given abilities from the anime My Hero Academia that can enhance your survival experience, have epic PVP or PVE fights

## Features
- 27 quirks that you randomly get when you spawn with a way to change them in survival in the works
- 4 fighting styles you can aquire by talking to the swordmaster 
- Mobs that will use the quirks to fight you
- Armours you can wear to cosplay as the characters

## Dependencies:
Pekhui

Kleiders Custom Renderer API

PlayerAnimator

GeckoLib

## Commands
- /mha <target> level <number> sets quirk level
- /mha <target> quirk <quirk> sets current quirk
- /mha <target> style <style> sets current fighting style
- /cooldownreset <target> resets all cooldowns

## Gamerules
- XpMultiplier: changes how much xp you get from a single kill
- DamageMultiplier: multiplies the damage you moves do
- QuirksMobSpawn: toggles mob spawning
- QuirkOnStart: toggles getting a quirk when you spawn
- QuirkOnDeath: randomizes your quirk on death
- MhaLevelReset: resets levels on death
- MhaLevelCap: changes the max level you can get to (max 100)
- XpRequirement: changes the xp needed to level up
- MhaLeveling: toggles the abiltiy to level up
- MhaRandomOfa: toggles getting ofa from any random quirk method
- MhaCopyOfa: toggles the ability to copy ofa
- MhaMiniQuirks: toggles smaller quirks without awakenings into random pools

## Current Quirks:

Explosion | Stress | GearShift | Frog | Rifle | Fierce Wings | Hellflame | Rabbit | Bloodcurdle | Engine | Air Cannon | Wave Motion | Binging Ball | Decay | Copy | Hardening | Steel | One for All | Muscle Augmentation | Permeation | New Oder | Repulsion Rings | Gale Gale | Big Fist | Frost | Ignition | Jet | Hair Raiser

## Current Fighting Styles:

Firey Sword | Sparking Sword | Flowing Sword | Gunhead
